name: Aether Book Pro 16"
notes: CTO primary machine. Loaded with M3 Max equivalent configuration, 64GB RAM, 2TB SSD.

name: Kinetic Ergonomic Mesh Chair
notes: Premium posture correction chair with adjustable armrests and mesh backing.

name: Aether Cine FX3 Camera
notes: Full-frame Cinema line camera. Stored in moisture-controlled case with 50mm f/1.2 lens.

name: Prism VR-X Spatial Headset
notes: Used by the spatial software development team. Calibrated for 90Hz eye-tracking.

name: BioScan-X Digital Microscope
notes: Digital optical microscope with 5000x magnification and USB capture output.

name: Aether Phone 15 Pro
notes: Aether Phone 15 Pro edition with titanium chassis.

name: Tata Salt
notes: Tata Salt Vacuum Evaporated Iodized Salt. Desh Ka Namak.
